name: Brazil
intro: Brazil runs Latin America's largest project economy: São Paulo's banks and fintechs iterate at global pace, the energy and agribusiness giants execute capital programs across a continental country, and international firms staff their South American delivery from Brazilian hubs. PMP recognition is long established through Brazil's strong PMI chapters, and the tech scene has made Scrum credentials mainstream. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for Brazil: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact Brazil timing is listed in the schedule below. What doesn't change: live weekend instruction in English, exam application guidance, realistic mock exams, and trainer access until you certify.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Brazil?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Brazil?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Brazil.
